header.title: Music
header.lead: Music is an integral part of our spiritual and cultural life — and our sanctuary's acoustics are a joy to sing in.

intro: We welcome singers and instrumentalists of all kinds, members and non-members alike, to share in our music ministry.

items.title: Choir
items.text: Rehearses Wednesdays 7:00–8:45pm and Sundays at 9:00am (three Sundays a month). New voices always welcome.

items.title: Choir 101
items.text: An introductory program offered each October, or by request — a gentle on-ramp to choral singing.

items.title: Community Messiah Sing
items.text: Our beloved annual December gathering to sing Handel's Messiah together.

items.title: Concert Series
items.text: Launched in Fall 2023, bringing guest artists and ensembles to our sanctuary.

artist.heading: Artist in Residence
artist.name: Leanne Rabesa
artist.text: A Boston-based freelance violist, arranger, and composer who enriches our worship and concerts throughout the year.

contact.heading: Get Involved
contact.text: Interested in singing or playing with us? We'd love to hear from you.
